name: Use of Singleton Pattern Without Synchronization in a Multithreaded Context
description: The product uses the singleton pattern to create a resource in a multithreaded environment without proper synchronization. This allows multiple threads to create separate instances simultaneously, breaking the singleton guarantee and potentially causing race conditions or inconsistent state.
detection_pattern: STRUCTURAL[singleton_pattern] node with CONTROL[thread_creation] or CONTROL[concurrent_access] where the singleton initialization lacks a CONTROL[synchronization] or CONTROL[lock] mediator. Multiple threads reaching the construction path without mutual exclusion.
